text.title: WCAG Severity Rubric Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the schema of a triaged a11y finding and the audit-level severity distribution report.

forbidden.pattern: finding with severity == "blocker" AND user_impact < 3 (and no override condition met)
finding with at_population ≥ 1 AND at_validation missing or "untested"
severity_distribution where blocker_count / total_findings > 0.30 — almost certainly over-tagged
finding with sla == "wontfix_with_rationale" but rationale field empty
automated tool output piped through without AT validation step

allowed-transformations.transformation: "Override" rule: any finding with user_impact == 3 (task-block) AND at_population ≥ 2 is severity=blocker, ignoring axes_sum.
For products with regulated WCAG-AAA target, all wcag_level == 1 (AAA) findings escalate one tier (minor → moderate, moderate → serious).
Root-cause clustering: 15 findings sharing a single root cause may be tracked as 1 work item with severity = max(clustered_severities).

list.item: every finding has all 3 axes scored (no nulls)
every at_population ≥ 1 finding has AT validation evidence
critical_journey_impact section identifies top 3 user journeys with their blocker count
any wontfix_with_rationale findings have rationale ≥ 30 words
